metadata.description: Vibecoding with the DHH philosophy — Claude Code plugin marketplace for Rails 8 + Hotwire + Kamal shipping. Distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, and Writebook.

plugins.name: dhh-vibecoding
plugins.description: 10 skills that make Claude Code fluent in DHH-style Rails: rails-conventions, turbo-frames, turbo-streams, stimulus-controllers, vanilla-css, auth-setup, solid-suite-config, rails-debug-helper, mayar-payment-integration, rubyllm-patterns. Zero build tools. No devise. No Sidekiq. No Redis. No Tailwind.
